{{Quote|Weapons for the Peace Brigade. Not my idea! I have an employer. I need this job. Please don't kill me and my crew.|Swori Mdimu to [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth">''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]''</ref>}}
'''Swori Mdimu''' was an [[Etti]] spacer who shipped weaponry to the [[Peace Brigade]]. His vessel, the ''[[Tinmolok]]'', was captured by the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] (under the guise of ''[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|Princess of Blood]]''), and the ''Tinmolok'' was confiscated. Mdimu and his crew were then jettisoned in an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]]. Later, Mdimu joined the Peace Brigade itself, and served as [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]]'s communications aide.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]'' {{1st}}
